title: Dev LLM proxy — Vite server proxy for /llm-proxy/* CORS avoidance
evidence: vite.config.ts updated with defineConfig(({ mode }) => {...}) pattern
loadEnv(mode, process.cwd(), '') for config-time env access
rewrite removes /llm-proxy prefix; client appends /v1 suffix
notes: No test needed for Vite config proxy — covered by integration test that uses it.
